judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the three black-and-white photographs of Pfc. Bennett, Maj. Pomerleau, and Pfc. Viets, but Description B adds detailed caption text not mentioned in Description A without contradicting it.
original_image_tags: black-and-white photograph of three men in military attire. The top man, Pfc. Bennett, is shown from the chest up, holding a butcher knife and looking directly at the camera. Below him is a headshot of Maj. Pomerleau. At the bottom is a headshot of Pfc. Viets, wearing a cap and looking slightly off-camera. Photo credit: -News Staff Photos by Gene Thomas.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A newspaper clipping mounted on a page, with one black-and-white portrait photograph of a young man at upper right and surrounding multi-column article text; visible headline text includes “NO SALE,” “CONFLICT,” and “HOVERS,” and the clipping is marked “THE WASHINGTON DAILY NEWS Greater Washington Edition 1-5-54” at the bottom right.*
